preview.summary: Turkey's gifted young attack faces Paraguay's hardened, well-drilled defense in a Group D meeting that could decide the runner-up race behind co-hosts USA. Turkey look to dominate the ball through their midfield talents while Paraguay sit deep and strike on transition.
preview.homeForm: Turkey qualified via the playoffs under Vincenzo Montella, building on a Euro 2024 quarter-final run, ranked around 22nd.
preview.awayForm: Paraguay returned after three missed World Cups, finishing sixth in CONMEBOL with wins over Brazil and Argentina, ranked around 40th-48th.
preview.homeKey: Arda Güler, Real Madrid playmaker pulling Turkey's creative strings.
preview.awayKey: Miguel Almirón, experienced number 10 linking Paraguay's play.
storylines: Turkey's youthful flair vs Paraguay's organized resilience
Group D's likely battle for second behind the USA
Almiron's tournament return for a resurgent Paraguay under Alfaro
preview.h2h: The nations have met only twice, with Paraguay unbeaten in those encounters.
